allow: Bash(# Check if there''s any subagents tool docs in the openclaw container docker exec openclaw-latest find /app -name ""*.md"" | xargs grep -l ""subagent"")
Bash(# Check browser tool availability docker exec openclaw-latest grep -r ""browser\\|Browser"" /app/src/agents/tools/browser-tool.schema.ts)
Bash(# Check if browser tool is available natively in openclaw docker exec openclaw-latest grep -r ""browser"" /app/src/agents/tools/browser-tool.ts)

Bash(# Check bot-creation skill the user mentioned find /Users/abror_mac_mini/Projects/bot -name ""*.md"" -o -name ""*.mjs"" -o -name ""*.js"" | xargs grep -l ""telegram bot\\|create.*bot\\|bot.*creat"" -i)

Bash(# Check what ""create bot"" could be - search for any bot-creation mentions grep -r ""создан.*бот\\|bot.*creat\\|new.*bot\\|telegram.*bot"" /Users/abror_mac_mini/Projects/bot/deployment/ --include=""*.md"" -i)
Bash(# Check if there are any mentions of ""bot creation"" or telegram bot skill in prompts grep -r ""бот\\|telegram"" /Users/abror_mac_mini/Projects/bot/openclaw-docker/prompts/ -i)
Bash(# Check docker events to see what happened recently docker events --since 24h --until 0m --format ''{{.Time}} {{.Type}} {{.Action}} {{.Actor.Attributes.name}}'')
Bash(# Go further back - check 7 days docker events --since 168h --until 0m --format ''{{.Time}} {{.Type}} {{.Action}} {{.Actor.Attributes.name}}'')
Bash(# Check all stop/kill events, wider docker events --since 168h --format ''{{.Time}} {{.Type}} {{.Action}} {{.Actor.Attributes.name}}'')
Bash(grep -v ".git" echo "===" find "/Users/abror_mac_mini/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/My Docs" -maxdepth 2 -type d)
Bash(# Check what workspace files the bot actually reads at startup docker exec openclaw-latest grep -r ""TOOLS.md\\|workspace"" /app/src/config/)
Bash(# Check how workspace TOOLS.md is loaded into the system prompt docker exec openclaw-latest grep -r ""TOOLS\\|workspace.*md\\|systemPrompt\\|soul"" /app/src/agents/)
